fields.label: Max Players
fields.description: Maximum number of clients allowed on this server.

validation.message: Max players must be a whole number.

fields.label: Bind Address
fields.description: IP/interface to bind the server to. Use all to listen on every interface.

fields.label: Public Server
fields.description: Announce this server to the public StarMade server list.

fields.label: Use Authentication
fields.description: Allow StarMade account authentication for connections.

fields.label: Require Authentication
fields.description: Require authenticated StarMade accounts to join.

fields.label: Use Whitelist
fields.description: Only allow players listed in whitelist.txt.

fields.label: Autosave Interval (sec)
fields.description: How often sectors are autosaved. Use -1 to disable.
fields.guidance: Very low intervals can increase disk activity; -1 disables autosave and is risky without manual backups.

validation.message: Autosave interval must be a whole number.
Thrust speed limit must be a whole number.

fields.label: Socket Buffer Size
fields.description: Incoming/outgoing socket buffer size in bytes.

validation.message: Socket buffer size must be a whole number.

fields.label: Use UDP
fields.description: Use UDP for networking instead of TCP.

fields.label: TCP No Delay
fields.description: Disable Nagle buffering for lower latency.

fields.label: Spam Protect Window (ms)
fields.description: Time window used by spam protection.

validation.message: Spam protection window must be a whole number.

fields.label: Spam Protect Max Attempts
fields.description: Maximum connection attempts allowed per window.

validation.message: Spam protection attempts must be a whole number.

fields.label: Sector Inactive Timeout (sec)
fields.description: Time before sectors go inactive (-1 disables).

validation.message: Sector timeout must be a whole number.

fields.label: Sector Cleanup Timeout (sec)
fields.description: Time before inactive sectors are removed from memory (-1 disables).

validation.message: Sector cleanup timeout must be a whole number.
Explosion concurrency must be a whole number.

fields.label: Chunk Thread Pool (Total)
fields.description: Total thread count for chunk requests.
fields.guidance: Setting this too high can increase CPU contention and frame-time spikes.

validation.message: Chunk pool size must be a whole number.

fields.label: Chunk Thread Pool (CPU)
fields.description: CPU generation threads used for chunk work.
fields.guidance: Keep near available core count minus one to avoid heavy CPU spikes.

validation.message: CPU chunk pool size must be a whole number.
